summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM Group Balia (hot tubs) site enhancements. All three new features verified: 1) Color admin with Cloudinary upload, 2) Enhanced product card with options panel, 3) Catalog download with contact form gate. Backend API tests: 12/12 passed. Frontend UI tests: All critical flows working.
passed_tests: /balie page loads with 6 product cards - WORKING
Product card click opens modal with left (photo, name, price, description, specs) and right (buttons) layout - WORKING
Modal 'Zloz zapytanie' button opens request form with name, phone, email fields - WORKING
Modal 'Skonfiguruj wlasny wariant' button navigates to /balie/konfigurator - WORKING
Admin panel /admin login with admin/220066 - WORKING
Admin 'Цвета' (Colors) tab under Купели group loads with 5 categories (spruce, thermo, wpc, fiberglass, acrylic) - WORKING
Admin 'Опции карточки' (Card Options) tab shows 14 API categories with checkboxes - WORKING
Admin enable card options -> Save -> Options appear in product modal on /balie - WORKING (full flow verified)
Hero section loads correctly - WORKING
Catalog download button in hero not visible (no catalog uploaded) - EXPECTED BEHAVIOR
Contact section with form fields (name, phone, email, message) - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/products - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/colors - WORKING
Backend API: POST /api/balia/colors (auth required) - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/card-options-settings - WORKING
Backend API: POST /api/balia/card-options-settings (auth required) - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/balia/calculator/prices - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/catalog/info - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/catalog/download (404 when no catalog) - WORKING
Backend API: POST /api/contact - WORKING
Backend API: GET /api/health - WORKING
critical_code_review_comments: All three new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Product modal correctly shows options from API only after admin enables categories in 'Опции карточки' tab
Color admin panel has proper Cloudinary integration for photo uploads
Catalog download button correctly hidden when no PDF uploaded
seed_data_creation: None - tests use existing API data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balia features fully tested. Three new features verified: 1) BaliaColorsAdmin.jsx for color photo uploads with Cloudinary, 2) BaliaCardOptionsAdmin.jsx for selecting which API categories appear in product cards, 3) BalieCatalogGate.jsx for catalog download with contact form gate. The product modal in BalieProducts.jsx shows options from /api/balia/calculator/prices filtered by enabled_categories from /api/balia/card-options-settings. Admin panel tabs: balia_colors and balia_card_options under Купели group.

color_admin.details: BaliaColorsAdmin.jsx loads with 5 color categories (spruce, thermo, wpc, fiberglass, acrylic). Upload functionality uses Cloudinary.

card_options_admin.details: BaliaCardOptionsAdmin.jsx shows 14 API categories with checkboxes. Save persists to /api/balia/card-options-settings.

product_modal_options.details: Product modal shows enabled options with live pricing. Options filtered by enabled_categories setting.

catalog_download_gate.details: BalieCatalogGate.jsx requires contact form before download. Button hidden in hero when no catalog uploaded.

request_form.details: Request form in product modal has name, phone, email fields. Submits to /api/contact.

configure_navigation.details: Configure button navigates to /balie/konfigurator with model parameter.
